description: Organize a legal research library for a 'Constitutional Law Seminar' by establishing a 'Constitutional Law Seminar' parent collection with subcollections for 'First Amendment', 'Due Process', and 'Judicial Review'. Populate these subcollections with the 10 pre-loaded library items according to their subject matter: 'NY Times v. Sullivan' and 'Tinker v. Des Moines' in 'First Amendment'; 'Brown v. Board', 'Miranda v. Arizona', 'Gideon v. Wainwright', 'Obergefell v. Hodges', and the article by Poe ('The Due Process Clause...') in 'Due Process'; and 'Marbury v. Madison', 'The Path of the Law' (Holmes), and 'Constitutional Fact Review' (Monaghan) in 'Judicial Review'.

First Amendment: New York Times Co. v. Sullivan
Due Process: The Due Process Clause and the Substantive Law of Torts
